Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 240}Before an exam period, you might find your classmates studying in the dormitory lounge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}A collaborative cram session can raise your {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} beyond what you could accomplish by studying alone.[n]{f 1 1}
